privileged_info_summary: The task operates on fully synthetic data generated at runtime. The mailbox is created with the name 'Leasing Office' and email address 'leasing@skyline-heights.local'. A conversation (ticket) is created with the subject 'Lease Renewal Question'. Customer persona data (first name, last name, job title, company, phone) is randomly selected from hardcoded lists at setup time. The task requires an agent to extract customer information from an email signature and update an incomplete customer profile in FreeScout (a help desk system).
